skill_match_scores: TypeScript:1.0, Node.js:0.5, PostgreSQL:1.0, API development:1.0, Backend development:1.0
must_have_quals: 2–5 years of software engineering experience (startup experience strongly preferred), Strong backend expertise with TypeScript/Node.js and PostgreSQL, Experience building production-grade systems and APIs, Background in early-stage or high-growth startup environments, Demonstrated ownership of features or systems end-to-end, Strong problem-solving skills and ability to operate in ambiguity, Based in or willing to relocate to San Francisco
preferred_quals: Experience with ML infrastructure, model serving, or real-time inference systems, Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) and distributed systems, Exposure to AI/LLM systems or agent-based architectures, Founder or founding engineer experience, Strong product intuition and ability to move quickly
core_responsibilities: Design and build scalable backend systems and APIs using TypeScript and Node.js, Architect and optimize PostgreSQL databases, including schema design and query performance, Develop infrastructure for containerized AI agent execution environments, Build and scale real-time ML inference pipelines and recommendation systems, Own features end-to-end, from problem definition to production deployment, Collaborate closely with founders to define product direction and technical architecture, Contribute across the stack as needed to support product and customer needs, Ship quickly in a fast-paced, high-ownership environment
job_summary: Recruiting from Scratch is a specialized talent firm dedicated to helping companies build exceptional teams. They are seeking a Fullstack Engineer (Backend Leaning) to design and build scalable backend systems and APIs, as well as optimize PostgreSQL databases and develop infrastructure for AI agent execution environments.
